name: Dawnchaser Compact
specialty: Experts in stealth and infiltration, known for their ability to navigate the treacherous labyrinth of the Undercity undetected

members.name: Aelis Vetra
members.note: The scar running down her left cheek is a constant reminder of a close call with a Rift Beast

members.name: Kyrus Thornshadow
members.note: Whispers of his past life as an assassin in the city above linger, causing tension among his fellow Glass Sigil members

visual: Aelis and Kyrus wear black leather cloaks with the Glass Sigil symbol embroidered on the back, accompanied by a set of silent crossbows hidden under their coats. They move with a stealthy grace, always alert and aware of their surroundings
reputation_note: Rumored to be the most efficient and discreet crew in the Undercity, the Dawnchaser Compact is a name synonymous with success and survival in the dangerous world beneath the Dome
